taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Software testing methodologies, Unit testing, Integration testing, System testing, Acceptance testing
skill_match_scores: Software testing methodologies:1.0, Unit testing:1.0, Integration testing:0.0, System testing:1.0, Acceptance testing:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, 3–5 years of QA or SDET experience, Strong understanding of software testing methodologies, including unit, integration, system, and acceptance testing, Proficiency in at least programming languages such as Python, Java, or JavaScript, Experience with automated testing tools (PyTest, JUnit, Cypress, Playwright, Selenium, etc.), Familiarity with CI/CD systems (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or similar), Strong understanding of test design principles and quality metrics
core_responsibilities: Build scalable test systems that ensure reliability across distributed and data-driven products, Design intelligent test suites that catch real-world issues before they reach customers, Automate everything. From functional to integration testing and embedding quality in the development lifecycle, Collaborate across teams to drive test-based design and continuous improvement in our CI/CD workflows, Diagnose, reproduce, and track issues through resolution using tools like Jira, GitHub Issues, or similar, Support code reviews and pair with developers to ensure testability and maintainability, Be a quality advocate, influencing how we build, deploy, and monitor software across environments
job_summary: Auger is the autonomous operating system for supply chains, connecting various enterprise systems into a unified data layer. They are seeking a Quality Assurance Engineer to ensure reliability and performance by designing automated test systems and improving CI/CD processes.
